reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 2.3% and 20-day momentum is 33.4%.
Trend quality is supported by 80% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 17.9% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.4%, downside volatility near 2.0%, and a recent max drawdown of 3.8%.
Volume confirmation is -3.1% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 2.8% versus SPY over 5 days and 2.8% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.62, confidence 0.41, and 0.4 weighted articles across 4 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.71, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 4 articles across 4 sources, 0.4 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.87, average source quality 0.81, confidence 0.74.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.114 with medium confidence.
